subject: An older, scarred humanoid figure in gold-trimmed royal Saiyan armor with a commanding expression, a second large imposing figure visible behind
description: An older humanoid figure occupies the foreground in a three-quarter pose, wearing elaborate gold-trimmed royal Saiyan-style armor. The figure has an aged, weathered face with visible scarring or stern features, and appears to wear a gold crown or headpiece. The expression is cold and imperious, suggesting command and control. Behind the foreground figure, a much larger muscular figure is partially visible, looming from above, establishing a controller-and-subject visual relationship. The background shows yellow-orange energy and a dramatic lighting effect. The composition is a mid-shot to wide scene.
foreground: Scarred older figure in gold royal armor with commanding expression
background: Larger looming figure behind, yellow-orange energy backdrop
